queries.question: Which block number is having the street resurfaced?
queries.sql: select Block_Number from streets join roadworks on Streets.StreetID = roadworks.StreetID where WorkType = 'Resurfacing'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?block_number WHERE {
  ?streets a :Streets .
  ?roadworks a :RoadWorks .
  ?roadworks p:hasStreets ?streets .
  ?streets p:Block_Number ?block_number .
  ?roadworks p:WorkType ?worktype_f .
  FILTER(?worktype_f = "Resurfacing")
}

queries.question: where does the resurfacing take place?
queries.sql: select Street_Name, Block_Number from streets join roadworks on Streets.StreetID = roadworks.StreetID where WorkType = 'Resurfacing'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?street_name ?block_number WHERE {
  ?streets a :Streets .
  ?roadworks a :RoadWorks .
  ?roadworks p:hasStreets ?streets .
  ?streets p:Street_Name ?street_name .
  ?streets p:Block_Number ?block_number .
  ?roadworks p:WorkType ?worktype_f .
  FILTER(?worktype_f = "Resurfacing")
}
